paymentSection.title: Saved Payment Method
paymentSection.empty: You don't have any saved payment methods yet.
paymentSection.removeError: Unable to remove this payment method. Please try again.

removeCardModal.title: Delete this card?
removeCardModal.body: This will permanently remove the card ending in {{last4}} from your account.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Deleting your account is permanent — after the 60-day grace period, it cannot be undone.

deleteAccountModal.title: Delete Account
deleteAccountModal.warning: Are you sure you want to delete your account? Your profile will be deactivated and permanently deleted from our servers in 60 days.
deleteAccountModal.confirmMethodLabel: Confirm with your password, or type DELETE below
deleteAccountModal.error: Unable to delete your account. Please try again.
deleteAccountModal.validation: Enter your password or type DELETE to confirm.

toast.accountDeleted: Your account has been successfully deleted.
